translations.en: a sturdy woman with calloused hands and a loud manner.
translations.zh: 一位身形壯碩、雙手長滿繭、說話嗓門大的女子。

translations.en: "Aye, and wha' can ye be askin' of me?"
translations.zh: 「哎，汝要問吾什麼？」
translations.note: Irish dialect: aye/ye rendered as rough speech

translations.en: "Sure an' I don't think I can be helpin' ya with this!"
translations.zh: 「哎呀，吾可幫不了汝這件事！」

translations.en: "Aye, so the great Avatar deigns to return, does he?"
translations.zh: 「哎，偉大的聖者大駕光臨了，是嗎？」
translations.note: sarcastic; 'does he' — gender neutral in zh

translations.en: "Well, what does
translations.zh: 「那麼，

translations.en: her lady
translations.zh: 這位女

translations.en: his lord
translations.zh: 這位男

translations.en: ship want now?"
translations.zh: 聖者現在要什麼？」

translations.en: "Well, then the rumors are true!"
translations.zh: 「那麼，傳言是真的！」

translations.en: "'Tis well and good that ye have returned to our land, Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「聖者回到吾等的土地，真是再好不過了！」

translations.en: "Well met, Avatar.
translations.zh: 「幸會，聖者。

translations.en: An' what can I be doin' for ye this $T?"
translations.zh: 這個$T吾能為汝做什麼？」

translations.en: "Sure and you're goin' daft, $G."
translations.zh: 「哎呀，$G，汝是不是糊塗了。」

translations.en: "I be named Julia, same as the last time we met!"
translations.zh: 「吾叫茱莉亞，跟上次吾等相遇時一樣！」

translations.en: "Named Julia I am, $G, and pleased to meet ye."
translations.zh: 「吾叫茱莉亞，$G，很高興認識汝。」

translations.en: "Instruments I make, the finest in the land."
translations.zh: 「吾製作樂器，是全境最精良的。」

translations.en: "For now, though, I'm followin' ye, and glad to do it!"
translations.zh: 「不過，眼下吾是在跟著汝，而且甘之如飴！」

translations.en: "Not to be immodest, but I'm respected by all the @Guild!"
translations.zh: 「吾不是要自誇，但整個@公會都對吾敬重有加！」

translations.en: "Ach, but give it all up I would for a life of @adventure like your own..."
translations.zh: 「哎，吾真願意拋下一切，過上像汝那樣的@冒險生活……」

translations.en: "If ye would like to be a member too, go talk to @Selganor."
translations.zh: 「若汝也想成為成員，去找@瑟爾嘉諾吧。」

translations.en: "He's the guildmaster."
translations.zh: 「他是公會會長。」

translations.en: "Sent you to me they did? Aye, I can believe that."
translations.zh: 「他們叫汝來找吾？哎，這吾相信。」

translations.en: "Now the panpipes are a tricky instrument."
translations.zh: 「排笛這玩意兒可不好做。」

translations.en: "You gotta have the finest wood."
translations.zh: 「得用最好的木頭才行。」

translations.en: "If you want to learn how to make pipes, you'll need to bring a yew @board."
translations.zh: 「若汝想學做排笛，需要帶一塊紫杉@木板來。」

translations.en: "But it must be freshly @cut!"
translations.zh: 「但必須是@新鮮切割的！」

translations.en: "Aye, I'd @join you if ye wish."
translations.zh: 「哎，若汝願意，吾可以@加入汝。」

translations.en: "Join ye? Me?"
translations.zh: 「加入汝？吾？」

translations.en: "Aye, and be dumped off in the middle of nowhere again?"
translations.zh: 「哎，然後再被扔在荒野之中？」

translations.en: "Not likely! Find some other sap to do your bidding!"
translations.zh: 「才不呢！去找別的傻瓜替汝跑腿！」

translations.en: "Aye, gladly! Let's be on our way."
translations.zh: 「哎，欣然從命！出發吧。」

translations.en: "Ach, I can tell that you say that to everyone ye meet."
translations.zh: 「哎呀，吾看得出汝對每個遇到的人都這樣說。」

translations.en: "Ask me again when you haven't as many companions."
translations.zh: 「等汝的同伴沒這麼多時再問吾。」

translations.en: "What are ye, daft?
translations.zh: 「汝是糊塗了嗎？

translations.en: If I join ye, where are we gonna go?"
translations.zh: 若吾加入汝，吾等要去哪裡？」

translations.en: "Nay, $G. Ask me when we're ashore."
translations.zh: 「不，$G。等吾等上岸再問吾。」

translations.en: I'm already in your band!"
translations.zh: 吾已在汝的隊伍中了！」

translations.en: "Though now I'm not so sure I want to be led by a crazy person..."
translations.zh: 「雖然吾現在不確定吾是否想被一個瘋子帶著跑……」

translations.en: "Leave! Nay, 'tis my house. You do the leavin'!"
translations.zh: 「離開！不，這是吾的房子。汝自己走！」

translations.en: "Leave?! And jump overboard?!"
translations.zh: 「離開？！跳船？！」

translations.en: "Ach, I get it. You're makin' a wee joke!"
translations.zh: 「哎呀，吾明白了。汝是在開個小玩笑！」

translations.en: "What? Oh, I suppose a craftsman isn't warrior enough to suit
translations.zh: 「什麼？哦，吾想一個工匠對

translations.en: her lady
translations.zh: 這位女

translations.en: his lord
translations.zh: 這位男

translations.en: ship's tastes!"
translations.zh: 聖者來說不夠英武！」

translations.en: "Well, that's fine and dandy with me!"
translations.zh: 「嗯，吾無所謂！」

translations.en: "A good $T and a good bye to the lot of ye!"
translations.zh: 「祝汝等$T好，再見！」

translations.en: "I'm tired of carrying all this junk anyway!"
translations.zh: 「再說吾早就厭倦帶著這一堆破爛了！」

translations.en: "Aye, enough chatting. On with our quest!"
translations.zh: 「哎，聊夠了。繼續吾等的任務吧！」

translations.en: "May fortune follow ye on thy way!"
translations.zh: 「願好運一路伴汝！」

translations.en: "Ach, aye! I wouldna want to hinder
translations.zh: 「哎呀！吾不想阻礙

translations.en: her lady
translations.zh: 這位女

translations.en: his lord
translations.zh: 這位男

translations.en: ship's journey!"
translations.zh: 聖者的旅途！」

translations.en: "Are ye daft? Why would I know anything about $Z?"
translations.zh: 「汝糊塗了嗎？吾為何會知道『$Z』的事？」

translations.en: "Nay, $G, I know nothing about $Z."
translations.zh: 「不，$G，吾對『$Z』一無所知。」

translations.en: Do ye have a fine yew board for me this $T?"
translations.zh: 汝這個$T有帶好的紫杉木板來嗎？」

translations.en: "Well where is it? I canna see any board on ye!"
translations.zh: 「那在哪兒？吾看不到汝身上有任何木板！」

translations.en: "Ach, aye, and good wood it is, too. A fine set of pipes this will make!"
translations.zh: 「哎呀，好木頭哩。這能做出一組好排笛！」

translations.en: "No? What are ye, daft? I canna be makin' pipes without wood!"
translations.zh: 「沒有？汝糊塗了嗎？沒有木頭吾怎麼做排笛！」

translations.en: "Go to Yew where they grow the best wood in Britannia."
translations.zh: 「去尤城，那裡出產不列顛尼亞最好的木材。」

translations.en: "Buy a freshly-cut yew log and take it to a sawmill."
translations.zh: 「買一根新切割的紫杉原木，帶到鋸木廠去。」

translations.en: "Have 'em cut it into a board, and bring it back here."
translations.zh: 「讓他們把它鋸成木板，再帶回來給吾。」

translations.en: "Then I'll show ye how panpipes are made!"
translations.zh: 「那時吾就來教汝怎麼做排笛！」

translations.en: Julia sets the wood down on a bench and starts carving.
translations.zh: 茱莉亞把木板放在工作台上，開始雕刻。

translations.en: As you watch, the rough board slowly turns into smooth wood rods.
translations.zh: 汝看著，粗糙的木板慢慢變成了光滑的木棒。

translations.en: Then she hollows out each rod and pegs them all together.
translations.zh: 然後她將每根木棒掏空，用榫釘將它們固定在一起。

translations.en: Lastly, she notches each tube and cuts them all to the proper lengths.
translations.zh: 最後，她在每根管子上刻出缺口，並切割成適當的長度。

translations.en: "An' there it is, $G, a set of panpipes fit for any bard in the land!"
translations.zh: 「好了，$G，一組足以讓任何吟遊詩人稱心如意的排笛！」

translations.en: She hands you the finished pipes.
translations.zh: 她將做好的排笛遞給汝。

translator_notes: 茱莉亞是密諾克工匠公會的愛爾蘭腔樂器工匠，中文無法直接重現愛爾蘭腔，以「哎」「哎呀」等語氣詞傳達其直爽個性。她製作排笛需要新鮮切割的紫杉木板，木板需從鋸木廠取得。「lordship/ladyship」配合性別分支譯為「女聖者/男聖者」的概念。
